children.heading: No lump-sum payment permitted for unused compensatory time
children.label: a No lump-sum payment permitted for unused compensatory time

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: No officer or employee of the United States Capitol Police whose service with the United States Capitol Police is terminated may receive any lump-sum payment with respect to accrued compensatory time off, except to the extent permitted under .section 1313(c)(4) of this title

children.heading: Overtime compensation for officers and employees exempt from Fair Labor Standards Act of 1938
children.label: b Overtime compensation for officers and employees exempt from Fair Labor Standards Act of 1938
A
children.text: the overtime work is carried out in connection with special circumstances, as determined by the Chief;

children.label: B
children.text: the Chief has established a monetary value for the overtime work performed by such individual; and

children.label: C
children.text: the sum of the total amount of the compensation paid to the individual for the overtime work (as determined on the basis of the monetary value established under subparagraph (B)) and the total regular compensation paid to the individual with respect to the pay period involved may not exceed an amount equal to the cap on the aggregate amount of annual compensation that may be paid to the individual under applicable law during the year in which the pay period occurs, as allocated on a per pay period basis consistent with premium pay regulations of the Capitol Police Board.

children.label: A
children.text: who is classified under regulations issued pursuant to as exempt from the application of the rights and protections established by subsections (a)(1) and (d) of section 206, section 207, and ; orsection 1313 of this titlesection 212(c) of title 29

children.label: B
children.text: whose annual rate of pay is not established specifically under any law.

children.heading: Effective date
children.label: B Effective date
children.text: The amendment made by subparagraph (A) shall take effect as if included in the enactment of the Legislative Branch Appropriations Act, 2003, except that the amendment shall not apply with respect to any overtime work performed prior to .March 4, 2010
